_comment: Expansion module file. Lives at json/expansions/<source>.json, where <source> matches the "source" tag used on the paths/traits this expansion adds in paths_traits.json (here, 'lakeview' — Path of the Modified / Path of the Risky Fella). Auto-loaded by the sheet when an expansion with this source is detected; can also be imported manually from the Expansions tab. The sheet only reads the 'source', 'name', 'bars', and 'counters' keys below — everything else (like this comment) is ignored and safe to keep for your own notes.
name: Lakeview

bars.label: Risk
bars._comment: How much Risk your character has taken on

bars.label: Smog
bars._comment: How much Risk your character has taken on
